title: callista disticha
intro: Callista disticha, also known as the "twice-twisted snail" or "twice-twisted moon shell," is a type of sea snail shell used as a medicinal plant. The plant is said to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Callista disticha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
